'''βàöd-s-sh-dh''' ('''kadasshedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vasoligate|vasoligate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-s-sh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vasoligate|vasoligate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| βàöd-s-sh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kadasshedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidashedhoko|thidashedhoko]] || [[word:jidashedhoko|jidashedhoko]] || [[word:shidashedhoko|shidashedhoko]] || [[word:kidashedhoko|kidashedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudashedhoko|thuthudashedhoko]] || [[word:jujudashedhoko|jujudashedhoko]] || [[word:shushudashedhoko|shushudashedhoko]] || [[word:kukudashedhoko|kukudashedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudashedhoko|thudashedhoko]] || [[word:judashedhoko|judashedhoko]] || [[word:shudashedhoko|shudashedhoko]] || [[word:kudashedhoko|kudashedhoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudashedhoko|thudashedhoko]] || [[word:judashedhoko|judashedhoko]] || [[word:shudashedhoko|shudashedhoko]] || [[word:kudashedhoko|kudashedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedashedhoko|thedashedhoko]] || [[word:jedashedhoko|jedashedhoko]] || [[word:shedashedhoko|shedashedhoko]] || [[word:kedashedhoko|kedashedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodashedhoko|thothodashedhoko]] || [[word:jojodashedhoko|jojodashedhoko]] || [[word:shoshodashedhoko|shoshodashedhoko]] || [[word:kokodashedhoko|kokodashedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodashedhoko|thodashedhoko]] || [[word:jodashedhoko|jodashedhoko]] || [[word:shodashedhoko|shodashedhoko]] || [[word:kodashedhoko|kodashedhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodashedhoko|thodashedhoko]] || [[word:jodashedhoko|jodashedhoko]] || [[word:shodashedhoko|shodashedhoko]] || [[word:kodashedhoko|kodashedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thΟΠdashedhoko|thΟΠdashedhoko]] || [[word:jΟΠdashedhoko|jΟΠdashedhoko]] || [[word:shΟΠdashedhoko|shΟΠdashedhoko]] || [[word:kΟΠdashedhoko|kΟΠdashedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadashedhoko|thathadashedhoko]] || [[word:jajadashedhoko|jajadashedhoko]] || [[word:shashadashedhoko|shashadashedhoko]] || [[word:kakadashedhoko|kakadashedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadashedhoko|thadashedhoko]] || [[word:jadashedhoko|jadashedhoko]] || [[word:shadashedhoko|shadashedhoko]] || [[word:kadashedhoko|kadashedhoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadashedhoko|thadashedhoko]] || [[word:jadashedhoko|jadashedhoko]] || [[word:shadashedhoko|shadashedhoko]] || [[word:kadashedhoko|kadashedhoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shadashedhithi|shadashedhithi]] || [[word:shadashedhiji|shadashedhiji]] || [[word:shadashedhishi|shadashedhishi]] || [[word:shadashedhiki|shadashedhiki]]
